title: dicerostylis rubra
intro: Dicerostylis rubra, also known as the red staminate plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dicerostylis rubra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Dicerostylis rubra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
